arts.ttl: Manchester City vs. Manchester United: Head to Head Record, Top Scorers
arts.sum: In 194 Manchester derbies, Manchester United has the edge over Manchester City in all-time results.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish vs Antony Stats Comparison Since Start of 2023/24
arts.sum: Jack Grealish and Antony's stats since the start of the 2023/24 season have been compared ahead of the Manchester Derby on December 15th.

arts.ttl: Man Utd SLASH Rashford asking price to force transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United have slashed their asking price for Marcus Rashford in the hopes of finding a club willing to sign him after deciding to put their mercurial talisman up for sale. The 27-year-old has been a mainstay in United’s first team since coming through the academy but his inconsistent displays and rumoured off-the-pitch habits have reportedly convinced the club to try and cash in on the forward.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes gives Man United mascot his jacket in heartwarming gesture ahead of Europa League clash in sub-zero conditions in Czechia
arts.sum: At Plzen's Doosan Arena, temperatures are currently minus one, with United stepping onto the field ahead of their tie in jackets to ward off the freezing temperatures.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Amorim's Man United travel to Viktoria Plzen
arts.sum: Manchester United aim to move one step closer to the Europa League last 16 against Plzen - follow for live updates!

arts.ttl: Amad handed new role as Ruben Amorim continues Man Utd rotation
arts.sum: Ama Diallo has primarily been deployed as the right wing-back when selected by Ruben Amorim in his 3-4-3 formation, but the coach opted to play him further forward in Manchester United's trip to Viktoria Plzen

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth immediate Premier League return route emerges after Manchester United exit
arts.sum: Manchester United parted ways with sporting director of five months Dan Ashworth after using extensive time and resources to get him from Newcastle

arts.ttl: Manchester United have verbal agreement for transfer – Entourage ‘practically agreed’ with all parties
arts.sum: Manchester United have a verbal agreement in place for youngster Diego León and his entourage are confident it will be concluded soon. That’s according to journalist Daniel Maciel, who reports that a verbal agreement is now in place between Manchester United and Cerro Porteño for the 17-year-old. arts.ttl: Rangers target designated fan area for Manchester United showpiece as Old Trafford allocation revealed
arts.sum: The Light Blues head for Old Trafford early next year in a second Battle of Britain Europa League clash

arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen v Manchester United: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Updates from 5.45pm GMT game in Czech Republic Live scores: follow all Thursday’s goals and games Ok – about tonight and some team news: Meanwhile – in Pilsen – United will be hoping to replicate their last win in Europe. And hoping to creep up that table. Continue reading...
